markets.title: Villarreal

markets.description: This market will resolve to "YES" if the match specified in the title ends in a draw after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties), or if the match is not completed with an official result by May 6, 2026, 19:00 UTC. Otherwise, it will resolve to "NO."
markets.title: Draw
